languages.text: "Мы делаем все, что можем — силами тех, кто еще остался на этой клятой планете. Вы не гнили здесь на протяжении долгих лет ожидания. Не вам нас судить".

traits.locale_text: [draft] "Мы делаем все, что можем — силами тех, кто еще остался на этой клятой планете. Вы не гнили здесь на протяжении долгих лет ожидания. Не вам нас судить".

languages.text: "We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."
languages.original_text: "Мы делаем все, что можем — силами тех, кто еще остался на этой клятой планете. Вы не гнили здесь на протяжении долгих лет ожидания. Не вам нас судить".

traits.locale_text: "We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."
"We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."
"We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."
"We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."
"We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."
"We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."

languages.text: "Wir tun alles, was wir können – diejenigen von uns, die noch auf diesem verdammten Planeten sind. Ihr musstet hier nicht jahrelang warten und langsam dahinsiechen. Ihr habt kein Recht, uns zu verurteilen."
languages.original_text: "We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."

traits.locale_text: "Wir tun alles, was wir können – diejenigen von uns, die noch auf diesem verdammten Planeten sind. Ihr musstet hier nicht jahrelang warten und langsam dahinsiechen. Ihr habt kein Recht, uns zu verurteilen."

languages.text: « Nous faisons tout ce que nous pouvons, mais nous ne sommes plus si nombreux sur cette maudite planète. Contrairement à nous, vous n'avez pas été contraint de gâcher de longues années de votre vie sur cette planète. Vous n'êtes pas en droit de nous juger ainsi. »
languages.original_text: "We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."

traits.locale_text: « Nous faisons tout ce que nous pouvons, mais nous ne sommes plus si nombreux sur cette maudite planète. Contrairement à nous, vous n'avez pas été contraint de gâcher de longues années de votre vie sur cette planète. Vous n'êtes pas en droit de nous juger ainsi. »

languages.text: “我们已经尽了最大的努力，所有活下来的人依然留在这颗该死的行星上。苦等这么多年，蹉跎人生的人又不是你，你没资格评判我们。”
languages.original_text: "We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."

traits.locale_text: “我们已经尽了最大的努力，所有活下来的人依然留在这颗该死的行星上。苦等这么多年，蹉跎人生的人又不是你，你没资格评判我们。”

languages.text: «Los que quedamos en este planeta condenado hacemos todo lo que podemos. Usted no ha tenido que pasarse años aquí esperando, marchitándose. No tiene derecho a juzgarnos».
languages.original_text: "We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."

traits.locale_text: «Los que quedamos en este planeta condenado hacemos todo lo que podemos. Usted no ha tenido que pasarse años aquí esperando, marchitándose. No tiene derecho a juzgarnos».

languages.text: 「私たちはこの忌まわしい惑星に未だに留まって、できる限りのことをしています。あなたは何年もここで待ち続け、無為に過ごす必要はなかったのです。だから、私たちを裁く権利はあなたにはありません」
languages.original_text: "We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."

traits.locale_text: 「私たちはこの忌まわしい惑星に未だに留まって、できる限りのことをしています。あなたは何年もここで待ち続け、無為に過ごす必要はなかったのです。だから、私たちを裁く権利はあなたにはありません」

languages.text: "Bu lanet gezegende kalanlar olarak yapabileceğimiz her şeyi yapıyoruz. Sen yıllarca burada beklemek, yitip gitmek zorunda kalmadın. Bizi yargılama hakkına sahip değilsin."
languages.original_text: "We are doing everything we can — those of us still left on this blasted planet. You did not have to wait here for years, wasting away. You do not get to judge us."

traits.locale_text: "Bu lanet gezegende kalanlar olarak yapabileceğimiz her şeyi yapıyoruz. Sen yıllarca burada beklemek, yitip gitmek zorunda kalmadın. Bizi yargılama hakkına sahip değilsin."
